Common.tagline: Your Japanese resume & CV, made simple.

Marketing.heroTitle: Start your job search in Japan with your resume.
Marketing.heroSubtitle: Create a resume and CV that Japanese companies accept — tailored to your residence status and native language. Export to PDF in one click.
Marketing.point1Body: Enter your details in Japanese, English, Chinese, or Vietnamese. The result is natural Japanese.
Marketing.point2Body: The AI only refines what you entered. It never invents experience you didn't write.
Marketing.point3Body: Produce a Japanese-format resume and CV as PDF — no garbled characters.
Marketing.trustNote: Creating documents and using your data for job referrals are kept separate. Even without consenting to referrals, document creation and PDF export work fully.

Dashboard.title: My Page
Dashboard.empty: You have no documents yet. Start from "Create a new document".

NewDocument.title: Create a new document
NewDocument.subtitle: Choose what you want to create. You can edit the content anytime.
NewDocument.resumeDesc: The most common document in Japan: name, education, work history, and motivation.
NewDocument.cvDesc: A document to describe your work experience and achievements in detail.
